productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men TR Yarn Dyed Black Trousers
description: CompositionBlack full length formal trousers made of TR yarn dyed cotton blend PV fabric for stretchability, has flat front with two pockets on the sides and one patch pocket inside the right one, two pockets on the back with metallic embellishments, metal zipper and button closure, loops on the waist to secure a belt and reinforced stitch detailing along the crotch area and the hemlineFittingRegularWash careMachine wash coldWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachTumble dry lowWarm ironA famous saying goes - "A man's class is raised by a bar with the trousers he wears". The man of substance always chooses his formal trousers with much care, and indigo nation makes it all the more easier with its classy range of formal trousers. Designed with the choicest of fabrics with a stretchable comfort that allows easy movement, this trouser makes for a perfect daily office wear. Pair it with classic formal shirts and leather shoes to look every bit like the corporate that you are.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers, length of 41.5"Height-6.1", waist-31"
